---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Kitra
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you want?
A clear description of the feature or change you're proposing.

## Why do you need it?
Explain your use case. What are you building, and why does Kitra's current API not cover it?
Vague requests like "add X" without context are likely to be closed.

## What does it look like?
If you can, sketch out what the API might look like — even rough pseudocode helps.

```c
// e.g. KitraDoSomethingNew(...)
```

## Alternatives you've considered
Is there a workaround you're currently using? Why isn't it good enough?

## Additional Context
Anything else — links, references, prior art in other libraries (e.g. raylib, SDL2), etc.

---

> ❌ This is not the place for help with your own project or general C questions.
> For those, please use a forum like [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com) or the [SDL2 Discord](https://discord.com/invite/SDL2).
